questions: Where do delta documents live and when are they consumed?
Can the near-cap skills carry the wiring steps?
What can Phase C verify without fabricating semantics?

findings.summary: delta lifecycle decided: authored at plan (qor/specs/<cap>/deltas/<sid>.md), declared in plan artifact, linted at audit, folded+deleted at seal
headroom verified: qor-audit 39536 / qor-substantiate 39502 vs 39936 lock -> pointer-steps only, prose in references/
plan.schema.json spec_deltas is additive (new_ceremony_artifacts precedent at :71); substantiate spec_corpus_hash additive; freeze lint covers new schema files only
qa_evidence.py:24,30 coverage pillar deferred by design -> Phase C is its producer; verify structure+existence, never semantics
self-application: first capability spec (spec-corpus) folded by this session's own seal
